items.title: Follow up with Gio on 7 diligence questions sent by Stephanie
items.context: Email from stephanie@fin.capital on Apr 28: Sent 7 detailed questions covering AI commoditization, migration process, ICP expansion, GTM segmentation, TAM, pricing, and comp breakdown vs Almanax/Olympix. Gio replied Apr 29: 'Will follow up on this.'

items.title: Follow up with Simone (Prism Layer) for deck and materials
items.context: Email from Jake on Apr 28 after their meeting: 'When you get a chance, can you please share the materials for our review?' No response received yet.

items.title: Discuss VanishID round participation after strong Q1 results
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on May 5: Q1 FY27 hit 148% of forecast ($1.17M new ARR, ending ARR $5.9M, 125% YoY, NRR 136%). Expects term sheets in coming weeks. Derek indicated open to syndicate participation pending terms and lead.

items.title: Prep for Aembit <> CTC meeting on May 14 at 4pm PT
items.context: Email from kdiaz@aembit.io on May 1 confirming: 'Yes, 4p PT on May 14th' for the follow-up meeting with CTC team.

items.title: Prep for IndyKite <> Fin Capital meeting on May 6
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Indy Kite <> Fin Capital' on May 6 at 4:30pm ET with Clare Liebenberg and Lasse Andresen from IndyKite, plus Matthew, Fan, Derek, and Jackie from Fin.

items.title: Prep for Blu Ventures Conference on May 6
items.context: All-day calendar event 'Blu Ventures Conference' on May 6 with back-to-back meetings scheduled: AC Sense, Cytactic, Blackwire Labs, SageView, Cipher, Armory Square Ventures, Icite Inc, OpsCanvas.

items.title: Confirm location for coffee with Evan Henley (Capital One) on May 6
items.context: Calendar event 'Coffee' on May 6 at 11am ET with evan.henley@capitalone.com — location listed as 'TBD', needs to be confirmed.
